Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend Complaint To Correct The Name Of Doe 1
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend Complaint To Correct The Name Of Doe 1 is Granted. No opposition filed.

The court signed the proposed order submitted by email.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
